value: removeEntry cascades: when an entry is removed, removeAliasesForKey and removeConfirmForKey are called automatically (src/commands/entries.ts:630-634). Removes any alias pointing to the key OR any of its children, and any confirm metadata for the same. Practical impact: don't write defensive alias/confirm cleanup after a remove — already handled. Discovered when post-test cleanup tried to alias_remove an alias whose target had just been removed and got "not found".
